name: polymarket_place_bet
description: Place a bet (limit order) on Polymarket prediction market.
description_for_agent: Place a bet on Polymarket. REQUIRES API KEY. Parameters: token_id (string, required — CLOB token ID), side (string, BUY or SELL, default BUY), price (float, 0.01-0.99 — the probability/price to buy at), size (float, amount in USDC). IMPORTANT: Always confirm with user before placing a bet. Show them the event, odds, and amount first. Returns order confirmation with order ID.

token_id.description: CLOB token ID of the outcome
